scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix web-crawler" "npm run dev --prefix web-crawler-frontend"
scripts.test: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green --kill-others-on-fail "npm run test --prefix web-crawler" "npm run test --prefix web-crawler-frontend"
scripts.test:run: npm run test:run --prefix web-crawler && npm run test:run --prefix web-crawler-frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix web-crawler && npm install --prefix web-crawler-frontend
